title: Korak 19

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Planets

Earth is our home planet, known for its abundant water, diverse ecosystems, and life-supporting atmosphere. It's the only planet in the solar system known to harbor life.

Saturn is famous for its beautiful and extensive ring system made of ice and rock particles. It's a gas giant with dozens of moons orbiting it.

Mars, the red planet, is a rocky world with the tallest volcano and deepest canyon in the solar system. It's a key focus for exploration in the search for past or present life.

challengeFiles.name: styles
script

tests.text: You should have a variable called associatedPanel that holds the id of the panel associated with the clicked tab.

description:
Sada je vreme da radimo na prikazivanju odgovarajućeg panela kada se klikne na karticu. Svaki panel ima id koji odgovara atributu aria-controls odgovarajuće kartice. Na primer, prvi panel ima id sa vrednošću panel-earth, što odgovara vrednosti atributa aria-controls za prvu karticu, koja je panel-earth.

Kreirajte varijablu nazvanu associatedPanel i dodelite joj vrednost tab.getAttribute("aria-controls"). Ovo će vam dati id panela koji odgovara kliknutoj kartici.
